data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Owner disbursement approval (monthly rental income statement)', but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for owner approval of the monthly statement, yet no API reads or persisted state checks were conducted to demonstrate that this approval process is implemented or functioning. This absence of evidence indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of owner disbursement approval for monthly rental income statements.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
